mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lots) AS total_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lots WHERE status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lots WHERE status = 'HOLD') AS hold_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE result = 'PASS' AND is_deleted = 'N') AS pass_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE result = 'FAIL' AND is_deleted = 'N') AS fail_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects) AS defect_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lot_id) FROM inspections WHERE grade = 'A' AND is_deleted = 'N') AS grade_a_lots, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lot_id) FROM inspections WHERE grade = 'B' AND is_deleted = 'N') AS grade_b_lots, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lot_id) FROM inspections WHERE grade = 'C' AND is_deleted = 'N') AS grade_c_lots, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment WHERE status = 'RUNNING') AS running_equipment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment) AS total_equipment_count, ROUND( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lots), 0) ) * 100, 2 ) AS defect_rate, ROUND( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE result = 'PASS' AND is_deleted = 'N') / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N'), 0) ) * 100, 2 ) AS pass_rate, ROUND( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment WHERE status = 'RUNNING') / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment), 0) ) * 100, 2 ) AS equipment_availability FROM dual

SELECT s.status, NVL(e.count, 0) AS count FROM ( SELECT 'RUNNING' AS status FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'IDLE' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'DOWN' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'PM' FROM dual ) s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM equipment GROUP BY status ) e ON e.status = s.status ORDER BY CASE s.status WHEN 'RUNNING' THEN 1 WHEN 'IDLE' THEN 2 WHEN 'DOWN' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT p.process_type, NVL(w.total_count, 0) AS total_count, NVL(w.planned_count, 0) AS planned_count, NVL(w.running_count, 0) AS running_count, NVL(w.done_count, 0) AS done_count, NVL(w.hold_count, 0) AS hold_count FROM ( SELECT '전극' AS process_type FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '조립' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '화성' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '검사' FROM dual ) p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT process_type, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PLANNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS planned_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS running_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hold_count FROM work_orders GROUP BY process_type ) w ON w.process_type = p.process_type ORDER BY CASE p.process_type WHEN '전극' THEN 1 WHEN '조립' THEN 2 WHEN '화성' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

WITH date_series AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1) AS stat_day FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{days} ), inspection_stats AS ( SELECT TRUNC(inspected_at) AS stat_day, COUNT(*) AS inspection_count, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N' AND inspected_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days} - 1) GROUP BY TRUNC(inspected_at) ), defect_stats AS ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS stat_day, COUNT(*) AS defect_count FROM defects WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days} - 1) GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.stat_day, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS stat_date, NVL(i.inspection_count, 0) AS inspection_count, NVL(i.pass_count, 0) AS pass_count, NVL(i.fail_count, 0) AS fail_count, NVL(df.defect_count, 0) AS defect_count FROM date_series d LEFT JOIN inspection_stats i ON i.stat_day = d.stat_day LEFT JOIN defect_stats df ON df.stat_day = d.stat_day ORDER BY d.stat_day

SELECT c.category, NVL(d.count, 0) AS count FROM ( SELECT 'ELECTRODE' AS category FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'ASSEMBLY' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'ACTIVATION' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'OQC' FROM dual ) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dt.category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM defects d INNER JOIN defect_types dt ON dt.id = d.defect_type_id GROUP BY dt.category ) d ON d.category = c.category ORDER BY CASE c.category WHEN 'ELECTRODE' THEN 1 WHEN 'ASSEMBLY' THEN 2 WHEN 'ACTIVATION' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
